# Bitcoin Weigh-In

> Bitcoin Weigh-In visualises one bitcoin's purchasing power as physical
> commodities — gold, silver, plutonium-238, cocaine — rendered at true
> relative scale next to a constant 9-kg Shiba Inu reference, with a daily
> updated dataset of commodity prices in BTC back to 2 January 2013.

The site has two surfaces: an interactive homepage with a live BTC-amount
slider and date scrubber, and a public CC-BY-4.0 dataset published in CSV,
JSON, NDJSON, and Parquet. Data sources are stooq (BTC, gold, silver,
platinum, copper, wheat, coffee) and FRED (Brent crude). BTC circulating
supply is computed deterministically from the protocol's halving schedule.
Plutonium-238 and cocaine are illustrative composite prices documented on
the methodology page; they appear in the visualisation but not in the
machine-readable dataset.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage — BTC purchasing power visualised](https://bitcoinweighin.com/): Interactive slider showing how much of each commodity 1 BTC buys today, with cube renderer at true relative scale.
- [Dataset](https://bitcoinweighin.com/data): Daily commodity prices in BTC, 2013-present. CC-BY-4.0. CSV, JSON, NDJSON, Parquet.
- [Methodology](https://bitcoinweighin.com/methodology): Sources, forward-fill logic, BTC supply derivation, cross-validation, versioning, illustrative pricing rationale.
- [Year-by-year snapshots](https://bitcoinweighin.com/snapshot): Historical BTC purchasing power per year (2013–present), with month-by-month closes against gold and silver.

## Per-commodity pages

- [Bitcoin to Gold](https://bitcoinweighin.com/btc/gold): Live BTC-to-gold ratio in troy ounces, historical chart back to 2013.
- [Bitcoin to Silver](https://bitcoinweighin.com/btc/silver): Live BTC-to-silver ratio in troy ounces, with monster-box and Silver Eagle comparisons.
- [Bitcoin to Plutonium-238](https://bitcoinweighin.com/btc/pu238): Illustrative BTC equivalence in the radioisotope that powers spacecraft.
- [Bitcoin to Cocaine](https://bitcoinweighin.com/btc/cocaine): Illustrative BTC equivalence at the producer / wholesale / retail tiers.

## Machine-readable endpoints

- [`/api/prices.json`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/api/prices.json): Full daily price archive, JSON.
- [`/data/prices.csv`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/data/prices.csv): Current version of the dataset as CSV.
- [`/data/prices.ndjson`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/data/prices.ndjson): One JSON record per line.
- [`/data/prices.parquet`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/data/prices.parquet): Apache Parquet, columnar.
- [`/sitemap.xml`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/sitemap.xml): Sitemap.
- [`/health.json`](https://bitcoinweighin.com/health.json): Build status, cross-validation flags, per-source fill records.

## Licensing and citation

The dataset is CC-BY-4.0; the visualisation code is public on GitHub
(<https://github.com/hmgovt/bitcoinweighin>). Cite the dataset as
"Bitcoin Weigh-In (<year>). Bitcoin Weigh-In Daily Commodity Price
Dataset". Contact info@sortathing.com for corrections.
